content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 — WARN — app is login-gated (SecureField in LoginView.swift) with a subscription paywall, but notes.txt says only "n/a" — no steps to reach the premium App-blocking features.
Pierre: Apple reviewers need actionable notes to test login-gated apps, especially when core features (FocusShield's App blocking, schedules, reports) sit behind a paywall. The demo credentials look real and usable, but "n/a" notes leave the reviewer no guidance on how to exercise the subscription flow or reach the gated functionality, which may trigger a rejection or review questions. Replace "n/a" with steps explaining sign-in, how to reach the paywall, and whether a sandbox/comped subscription is needed to test blocking.
